text: [Injured] Ankle injury Ruled out for "weeks" on 9/12 with an ankle injury. On the pitch and “quite close” as of 30/1. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Has been out since late November with a knee injury. In individual training as of 28/1 and expected to join team training in the days after that. Could feature against Brentford on 1/2. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Arrived at Aston Villa carrying a small injury. Still sidelined as of 30/1. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Ruled out for three weeks on 28/1 with a hamstring injury. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a serious knee injury in the FA Cup tie against Spurs on 10/1. Will miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Everton on 18/1. Ruled out for 6-8 weeks on 28/1. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Taken off in the match against Newcastle United on 25/1 with an ankle injury. His manager said on 28/1 that he would be out for 8-10 weeks. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Came off early in the match against Salzburg on 29/1 after he “felt something” in his hamstring. A scan has returned “no clear injury” and he could return for Brentford on 1/2. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Came off in the match against Manchester United game on 15/12 with a knee injury. His manager ruled him out for 2-3 months on 19/12. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Revealed to be recovering from a muscle injury as of 7/11. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Ankle injury Suffered a twisted ankle in the match against Newcastle on 10/1. Has been sidelined since. Getting close to a return as of 30/1 but it’s likelier he’ll be back for the Aston Villa game on 7/2. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Suffered a serious ankle injury in training on 1/1. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a suspected hamstring injury on 18/11 while playing for Scotland. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury The club confirmed on 6/1 that he had undergone knee surgery and "will consequently face a period away from the pitch as part of his recovery". His manager estimates an absence of 3-4 months. [Source]
[Injured] Knock His manager said he would be sidelined for “some time” on 19/1. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Brighton on 19/1. His manager fears he’ll be out for “some time” but there is no exact return date. Will miss the Liverpool game on 24/1 for sure. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Ankle injury Taken off in the match against Nottingham Forest on 25/1 with an ankle injury. Has avoided serious injury but his manager is not sure if he will be fit for Aston Villa on 1/2. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was reported on 20/11 that he had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury and would be out for the rest of the season. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Knee injury Taken off in the match against Nottingham Forest on 25/1 with a knee injury. Has avoided serious injury but his manager is not sure if he will be fit for Aston Villa on 1/2. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Recovering from an anterior cruciate ligament injury. Reports suggest he will be back in contention in the New Year. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His club reported on 15/10 that he had suffered an ACL injury and had undergone season-ending surgery. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Suffered a “small issue” in training and will be assessed before the Everton match on 31/1. [Source]
[Injured] Lack of match fitness Missed the start of the season with a knee injury. Back in team training as of 23/1 but won't be rushed back after so long out. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Aston Villa on 3/12. He will be out for the season after ACL damage was detected. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His manager confirmed on 26/7 that he will undergo surgery on a knee ligament injury. [Source]
[Injured] Toe Injury Missed the West Ham game on 30/12 due to a toe injury and has been sidelined since. Still unavailable as of 23/1. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Reports in July suggest he has undergone surgery on an ACL injury. Faces a long spell on the sidelines. Four months away as of 23/12. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Returned from a long-term knee injury in pre-season but had a small setback with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager reported another setback on 16/10. On the grass as of 23/12 but his club are taking their time with him. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a serious knee injury in the match against Everton on 27/12. Ruled out for nine months. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Missed the start of the season. Had been training and aiming for a return to action after the October international break but he has had a setback and will be out for “a few months”. Still "some time" away as of 23/12. [Source]

[Injured] Ankle injury Ruled out of the Man Utd game on 7/1. His manager says it was initially thought he had sustained a knock but that scans would be needed to investigate the source of his "persistent pain". Ruled out for “weeks” as of 15/1. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off as a precaution in the match against Brentford on 17/1 due to hamstring discomfort. Ruled out for “weeks” on 20/1. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Sustained an injury after slipping in training and will be out for a month from 23/1. [Source]

[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament It was revealed on 7/8 that he has suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury and has since had an operation. He is expected to miss most of the 2025/26 season. [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Substituted early in the game against Qarabag on 5/11 with a quad injury. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 15/1 that he was on the grass but not yet in team training. [Source]
[Suspended] Provisionally suspended by the Football Association after failing a drugs test. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Groin Injury Missed the AZ Alkmaar game on 6/11 with an abductor injury and hasn’t played since. Had a further setback in his recovery and his manager ruled him out for a further 4-6 weeks on 17/12. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Ruled out for 3-4 weeks with a twisted ankle on 30/1. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Ruled out of the Brentford game on 26/1 with a knee injury. It was subsequently revealed that he would miss the rest of the season and the start of 2025/26. Hasn’t been seen since. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Man City on 14/12. Ruled out for 8-10 weeks. Could be back for the Brighton game on 8/2. [Source]
[Injured] Back injury Has missed most of pre-season with back problems and his manager said on 8/8 that he does not know when he will return. Hasn’t been seen since. [Source]
[Unavailable] Won’t be considered for selection on 1/2. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Fulham game on 1/1 with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager doesn’t expect anyone to return for Aston Villa on 7/1. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Will miss the Nottingham Forest match on 1/2 with a minor muscle injury but should return thereafter. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Sent off after picking up two yellow cards against Chelsea on 25/1. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury Confirmed on 20/1 that he had suffered a stress fracture in his foot. Could be out for the season if surgery is required. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Knock Missed the cup tie against Sunderland on 10/1 with a minor injury. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 30/1 that Everton were “waiting a little bit” on the player but that he was “getting much closer”. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Personal Reasons Suffered a family bereavement in the run-up to the Manchester United game on 1/2 and it will be up to him decide if he plays. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with an injury in the match against Leeds on 17/1. His manager fears it is a serious one and said the player was struggling to walk. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Felt discomfort in his hamstring and had to come off in the match against Everton on 8/11. He will now undergo surgery and is set to be out until mid-February. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Has been out since New Year’s Day with a hamstring issue. Back in training ahead of the Brighton game on 24/1 but didn’t feature. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Fulham game on 17/1 with a hamstring injury. Ruled out for 3-5 weeks initially but his manager now thinks it’ll be at the lower end of that scale. Will likely be back on the other side of the Nottingham Forest match on 6/2 but could even have a "small chance" for that game. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury A “question mark” for the Everton game on 26/1 because of adductor issues. Missed out. His manager said after that match that the original prognosis was 3-4 weeks out but that things have improved and he should only be unavailable for a further 1-2 games at worst. May even have a "little chance" of facing Arsenal on 31/1 although he is yet to train. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Partly back in training on 22/1 after seven weeks out with a hamstring injury. His manager said he’d need more time to be match-fit. In contention for the Arsenal game on 31/1. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Will miss the Arsenal game on 31/1 with a hamstring injury but has a "chance" of being fit for the Nottingham Forest match on 6/2. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the whole of pre-season and the start of 2025/26 with a hamstring injury. Reports on 7/1 suggest another setback and that he'll not feature before the end of the month. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Arsenal on 8/1. His club described it as a "significant" injury on 11/1 and he will have to undergo surgery. Ruled out for the season. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Has been sidelined since September with a hamstring injury but it was reported on 5/12 that he was back on the grass doing ball work and ahead of schedule. Still not in full training as of 11/1. [Source]
[Injured] Groin Injury Suffered a groin issue in the match against Qarabag on 28/1. Will be out for a “few weeks”. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Suffered a "bone on bone" knock in the match against Bournemouth on 24/1 and had to come off. Will miss the Newcastle game on 31/1 but could be back soon after that. [Source]

[Injured] Ankle injury Taken off with a serious injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 20/12. Underwent surgery on 22/12 on "an ankle injury that included a fibula fracture". His manager ruled him out for "months" on 23/12 but is confident he'll play again this season. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the match against Southampton on 23/9. Has torn his ACL and will be out for a year. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Came off early in the match against Brentford on 17/12 with a hamstring injury. Has been sidelined since and remains out as of 16/1. [Source]
[Injured] Calf injury Suffered a calf injury in the match against Galatasaray on 28/1. Could return quicker than the 18 days it took him to recover from a similar injury last time. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a muscle injury in the match against Chelsea on 4/1. Ruled out for 4-6 weeks. Will return to training on 2/2. [Source]

[Injured] Leg injury Taken off with a leg injury in the match against Chelsea on 4/1. His club confirmed that he'd "suffered a tibial fracture to his right leg" and would undergo surgery. Is likely to be out for months but no official timeline has been provided. His manager says he will be out for “a long time”. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 2/11 with an ankle injury. His manager said "he will be out for a while". [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Taken off early in the second half of the match against Sunderland on 1/1. His manager expects him to be out for at least six weeks. [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Missed the Sunderland game on 6/12 with a leg injury. Won't be involved against Real Madrid on 10/12 and his manager does not know how long he will be out. Still sidelined as of 16/1. [Source]

[Injured] Back injury Missed the West Ham game on 4/12 with a niggling back injury. Has been unavailable since as the recovery is taking much longer than anticipated. His manager said on 23/1 that he is hoping he could be back within a “couple of weeks”. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Forced off during the Arsenal match on 25/1 with what looked like a hamstring injury. Reports have since suggested he could be out for 10 weeks but his manager would only say “a few weeks”. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the Manchester derby on 17/1 with an unspecified issue. The player himself says he will be out for two weeks. Back in training as of 30/1. [Source]
[Injured] Groin Injury Taken off in the match against Aston Villa on 25/1 with a groin injury. Will be out for “weeks”. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a knee injury on international duty with Sweden and missed the Manchester City match on 22/11 as a result. Has been absent since. Is “further back” in his recovery compared to other Newcastle defenders as of 2/1. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Ruled out of the Chelsea game on 20/12. His manager said he is "not feeling great in his body at the moment." [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the FA Cup tie against Bournemouth on 10/1 and has been sidelined since. Is 5-6 weeks away as of 30/1. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Taken off with a significant ankle injury in the match against Leeds on 7/1. Subsequently underwent surgery and will be out for around three months. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Injured in the process of conceding Nottm Forest's third goal in their defeat to Aston Villa on 3/1. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 9/1 that he'd had some blood drained from his knee but the injury hasn't settled as quickly as hoped. Has since undergone surgery and is expected to miss the rest of the season. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Europa League match against Ferencvaros on 29/1 with a knee injury. Could be out for “days or weeks” but he will definitely sit out the Crystal Palace game on 1/2. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Porto game on 23/10 and has been sidelined since. On the grass as of 11/12 but still some way from a return. It was revealed on 27/12 that he had undergone surgery and would be out for “weeks” more. [Source]
[Injured] Shoulder injury Missed the start of the season with a shoulder injury. Training with the under-21s to build fitness as of 9/1. [Source]
[Injured] Lack of match fitness Arrived at Sunderland nursing an ankle injury. His new manager said on 22/1 that he’d need 2-3 weeks to build match fitness. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Returned from the Africa Cup of Nations with an ankle injury. Will be out for four to six weeks from 15/1. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Returned from the Africa Cup of Nations with a knee injury. Will be out for three to four weeks from 15/1. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Sustained an ankle injury in the victory over Crystal Palace on 17/1 and is now undergoing a period of rehabilitation. Will be out for about a month. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Bournemouth on 7/1. Subsequently underwent surgery and is expected to be out for a lengthy period. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Came off with an ankle injury in the match against Borussia Dortmund on 20/1. His manager said it looks like a “longer” one in terms of timeline. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Stretchered off with a serious-looking injury in the match against West Ham on 17/1. It was revealed on 19/1 that he has undergone surgery on a fractured ankle [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the FA Cup tie against Aston Villa on 10/1 and will be assessed. Ruled out for seven weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Taken off with an injury in the match against Sunderland on 4/1. Ruled out until after the March international break. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knock in the match against Crystal Palace on 11/5. It later transpired that he had sustained a knee injury and would need season-ending surgery. Missed the start of 2025/26 and is still out as of 4/12. [Source]
[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament Suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury in pre-season and will miss a significant period of 2025/26. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Ruled out for four weeks with a hamstring injury on 27/1. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Will miss the game against Eintracht Frankfurt on 28/1 with a minor niggle. Is “touch and go” for the Man City match on 1/2 but has been on the grass. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Back injury It was reported on 6/11 that he was currently sidelined with a back injury. Hasn’t played since. [Source]
[Injured] Back injury Missed the cup tie against QPR on 10/1. Is in “treatment” as of 15/1. Hasn’t featured since and is still unavailable as of 22/1. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was revealed on 22/1 that he had suffered a season-ending knee injury that may even keep him out of the start of 2025/26. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Brentford game on 20/12 with a hamstring injury. Ruled out for a significant period of time on 23/12. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Illness A slight doubt for the Bournemouth game on 31/1 due to illness. [Source]
